summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of BIBI Cars CRM History Reports system. Tested all 8 API endpoints, role-based access control, full workflow integration, and CarVertical mock integration. Core logic 'report = only after confirmed contact + manager decision' working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Duplicate request returns 201 instead of expected 200/400 when report already exists
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works correctly, just unexpected status code

expected_behaviors.behavior: Correctly fails approval without verified call session
expected_behaviors.message: Cannot approve - no verified call with client

passed_tests: Check access endpoint - correctly denies without lead
Request report creation - creates pending reports
Get pending reports - admin sees all, manager sees assigned
Analytics endpoint with correct data aggregation
Role-based access control (managers denied admin endpoints)
Get report by VIN - correctly requires access
Full workflow integration (request → pending → approval logic)
